fields.name: riskScore
fields.comment: Risk score assessment result from the agent

fields.name: validationFindings
fields.comment: List of validation findings from document extraction and policy checks

fields.name: matchScore
fields.comment: Similarity match score in percent (0-100) for duplicate check results

fields.name: routingDecision
fields.comment: Routing decision based on risk score: APPROVAL, CLARIFICATION, or DECLINE

fields.name: processingSteps
fields.comment: Processing steps with timing and log lines from agent tool execution

fields.name: supplier
fields.comment: The supplier related to the action

fields.name: suppliers
fields.comment: The list of suppliers related to the action

fields.name: supplierSearchCriteria
fields.comment: Search criteria to find the supplier
